mapper.sql: select t.subject_id, t.subject_code, t.groupid, t.subject_name, t.subject_level, t.parent_code, t.subject_type, t.direction, t.is_leaf, t.status, t.created_time, t.is_foreign_currency, t.is_quantity, t.is_cash, t.unit_of_measure, t.auxiliary_type,ty.name subjectTypeName, t.is_exchange, t.foreign_currencys, t.is_parallel, t.is_inventory_detail_enabled, t.is_auxiliary, t.updated_time from fin_accounting_subjects t left join fin_subject_type ty on t.subject_type = ty.id
mapper.insert:
insert into fin_accounting_subjects
subject_id, subject_code, groupid, subject_name, subject_level, parent_code, subject_type, direction, is_leaf, is_foreign_currency, is_quantity, is_cash, unit_of_measure, auxiliary_type, is_exchange, foreign_currencys, is_parallel, is_inventory_detail_enabled, is_auxiliary, status, created_time, updated_time,
#{subjectId}, #{subjectCode}, #{groupid}, #{subjectName}, #{subjectLevel}, #{parentCode}, #{subjectType}, #{direction}, #{isLeaf}, #{isForeignCurrency}, #{isQuantity}, #{isCash}, #{unitOfMeasure}, #{auxiliaryType}, #{isExchange}, #{foreignCurrencys}, #{isParallel}, #{isInventoryDetailEnabled}, #{isAuxiliary}, #{status}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from fin_accounting_subjects where subject_id in
#{subjectId}
mapper.select: SELECT subject_id, subject_code, groupid, subject_name, subject_level, parent_code, subject_type, direction, is_leaf, `status`, is_foreign_currency, is_quantity, is_cash, unit_of_measure, auxiliary_type, is_exchange, foreign_currencys, is_parallel, is_inventory_detail_enabled, is_auxiliary, created_time, updated_time,subject_type FROM fin_accounting_subjects WHERE groupid = #{groupid} AND subject_code = #{subjectCode} AND `status` = 1

SELECT subject_id, subject_code, groupid, subject_name, subject_level, parent_code, subject_type, direction, is_leaf, `status`, is_foreign_currency, is_quantity, is_cash, unit_of_measure, auxiliary_type, is_exchange, foreign_currencys, is_parallel, is_inventory_detail_enabled, is_auxiliary, created_time, updated_time,subject_type FROM fin_accounting_subjects WHERE groupid = #{groupid} AND `status` = 1 ORDER BY subject_code

SELECT subject_id, subject_code, groupid, subject_name, subject_level, parent_code, subject_type, direction, is_leaf, `status`, is_foreign_currency, is_quantity, is_cash, unit_of_measure, auxiliary_type, is_exchange, foreign_currencys, is_parallel, is_inventory_detail_enabled, is_auxiliary, created_time, updated_time,subject_type FROM fin_accounting_subjects WHERE groupid = #{groupid} AND subject_code LIKE #{subjectCodePattern} AND `status` = 1 ORDER BY subject_code

SELECT subject_id, subject_code, groupid, subject_name, subject_level, parent_code, subject_type, direction, is_leaf, `status`, is_foreign_currency, is_quantity, is_cash, unit_of_measure, auxiliary_type, is_exchange, foreign_currencys, is_parallel, is_inventory_detail_enabled, is_auxiliary, created_time, updated_time,subject_type FROM fin_accounting_subjects WHERE groupid = #{groupid} AND parent_code = #{parentCode} AND `status` = 1 ORDER BY subject_code

SELECT subject_id, subject_code, groupid, subject_name, subject_level, parent_code, subject_type, direction, is_leaf, `status`, is_foreign_currency, is_quantity, is_cash, unit_of_measure, auxiliary_type, is_exchange, foreign_currencys, is_parallel, is_inventory_detail_enabled, is_auxiliary, created_time, updated_time,subject_type FROM fin_accounting_subjects WHERE groupid = #{groupid} AND subject_code = #{subjectCode} AND `status` = 1
